title: fragaria viridis var. dubia
intro: Fragaria viridis var. dubia is a variant of the wild strawberry plant, scientifically known as a green-leaved strawberry species. This plant is traditionally valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to the presence of ellagic acid and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Fragaria viridis var. dubia include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support digestive well-being. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and roots can also be dried and used in herbal remedies, offering a natural approach to addressing various health concerns.
